agent_hint: Create a public site key. Caller provides only the display name; the platform server-generates the public abk_ key and sets status=active. Returns the created record including the generated site_key.

extension.confirmMessage:zh-CN: 确认禁用该站点密钥？禁用后该密钥将停止采集匿名遥测。
extension.confirmMessage:en: Disable this site key? Anonymous telemetry collection will stop for it.

agent_hint: Disable a site key by record id (pid). Sets status=disabled and evicts the resolver cache so it no longer resolves to its tenant.
